spec.name: The Bottom Of The Stairs
spec.description: The stairs lead down to a damp part of the castle, you can hear water dripping somewhere around you. The area is lit by a single torch flickering in the room which this staircase is built off of. The stairs lead upwards and they open up onto a fairly small room to the east.

east.description: A small room opens up to the east.

up.description: The stairs lead upwards out of this dank, dark place.
